title: Does Monday not calculate Duration automatically from Start and End dates?
excerpt: Why doesnt Duration get automatically calculated?? Seriously??

posts.author: sajit.nair.mbc.net (Sajit Nair)
posts.cookedHtml: Why doesnt Duration get automatically calculated?? Seriously??

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sajit.nair.mbc.net ,

Create a formula column and it will capture the duration automatically. Use the function Days({Timeline/End}, {Timeline/Start}).

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sajit.nair.mbc.net - if you are using a timeline column there is built in duration functionality to calculate duraction:

If you are using two date columns rather than a timeline, the duration column does not apply. You would then need to use a formula like @aquibk mentioned. Or you could us an app to manage this.

Thanks
Mark
